descriptors.name: grain size
descriptors.physical_meaning: average crystal grain diameter in microstructure
descriptors.rationale: controls mechanical properties and recrystallization kinetics

quality.loss_reason: full distribution compressed to single mean
quality.notes: loses shape, variance, multimodality of distribution

descriptors.name: crystallographic texture
descriptors.physical_meaning: orientation distribution function of crystal grains
descriptors.rationale: determines anisotropic material properties and formability

quality.loss_reason: infinite series truncated at finite order
quality.truncation_error: depends on truncation order, typically small
quality.notes: high-order terms discarded, sharp textures poorly captured
no information on recrystallized grain locations

descriptors.name: dislocation density
descriptors.physical_meaning: total line length of dislocations per volume

quality.loss_reason: spatial heterogeneity and dislocation types lost
quality.notes: ignores local concentrations and character distribution

descriptors.name: grain boundary character distribution
descriptors.rationale: boundary type affects migration and properties

quality.loss_reason: boundary plane orientations and topology lost
quality.notes: coarse discretization, omits higher Sigma values

descriptors.name: misorientation angle distribution
descriptors.physical_meaning: distribution of angles between neighboring grains

quality.loss_reason: binning and loss of axis information
quality.notes: rotation axis and spatial correlations lost

descriptors.name: grain boundary mobility
descriptors.rationale: controls grain growth and recrystallization rate

quality.loss_reason: temperature and character dependence averaged out
quality.notes: single value masks strong boundary type variation
single value for heterogeneous grain population

descriptors.name: stored energy
descriptors.physical_meaning: elastic strain energy from crystal defects

quality.loss_reason: spatial heterogeneity and defect contributions collapsed
